LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS HDR GLOBAL TRADING LIMITED, ARTHUR HAYES, AND ABS GLOBAL TRADING LIMITED'S MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY ON GROUND OF INCONVENIENT FORUM IS OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT, ON ITS OWN MOTION, FINDS THAT THE CASE SHOULD BE DESIGNATED AS COMPLEX AND SINGLY ASSIGNED. THE MOTION MAY BE RENOTICED IN THE APPROPRIATE DEPARTMENT AFTER ISSUANCE OF AN ORDER DESIGNATING THE CASE COMPLEX AND SETTING AN INITIAL CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-22-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. 170.6 PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE OF THE HON. ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO IS SUSTAINED. REASSIGNMENT PENDING.
